original_snippet_context: Report on the state of financial markets, including exchange rates and coffee prices.
relevant_quote: O cambio oscilla, provavelmente para altitudes difficilmente alcançadas; descendo os saques a 15 1/16 e 15 1/2 d., nos bancos estrangeiros, e a 15 3/8 d. no do Brasil, contra o particular a 15 11/16 d...fechando ainda com boa alta a 15 15/16 e a 15 7/8 bancario, 15 15/16 particular.
justification: This section reports on the fluctuating exchange rates, mentioning specific values (15 1/16d, 15 1/2d, etc.) without expressing any opinion or linking them to any particular monetary policy stance.
